cards.title: OpenAI Launches Lockdown Mode for Data Protection
cards.body: OpenAI unveiled Lockdown Mode to reduce prompt injection attacks and protect sensitive data sharing. While vulnerabilities may persist, the feature aims to minimize data exposure risks.

cards.title: Apple Intelligence Updates Incoming at WWDC 2026
cards.body: Apple's WWDC event will feature a highly anticipated Siri revamp and Apple Intelligence updates. Expect major announcements on AI-powered features across the ecosystem.

cards.title: White House AI Advisor Sriram Krishnan Departs
cards.body: Sriram Krishnan is stepping down from his White House AI advisor role. He plans to launch a new institution to continue influencing Trump's AI policy.

cards.title: Trump Administration Eyes OpenAI Equity Stake
cards.body: President Trump discussed potential deals giving Americans a stake in AI's success. The administration is exploring equity participation in major AI companies.

cards.title: Startup Battlefield 200 Applications Close June 8
cards.body: Final deadline for Startup Battlefield 200 applications is June 8, 11:59 p.m. PT. Winners will compete at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 in San Francisco.

cards.title: Google Pays SpaceX $920M Monthly for Compute
cards.body: Google signed a deal with SpaceX worth $920 million per month for compute resources. The agreement reflects unprecedented demand for Google's newly launched AI products.

cards.title: Startups Build 'Together Tech' Counter to AI
cards.body: Founders are increasingly building solutions that get people off phones and into real-world interactions. Board, a startup funding in-person gaming, exemplifies this counter-AI trend.

cards.title: AI Industry Scrambles to Manage Runaway Costs
cards.body: The AI sector is shifting from "move fast" to implementing guardrails on spending. Token costs have become a critical focus as companies seek cost control.

cards.title: AirTrunk Commits $30B for India AI Data Centers
cards.body: Australian data center operator AirTrunk plans 5GW capacity expansion in India. The $30 billion investment signals major infrastructure push for AI computing.

cards.title: Mira Murati Re-emerges from Spotlight Carefully
cards.body: Murati is strategically increasing visibility to maintain market presence. Staying low-profile increasingly requires making noise to remain relevant.

cards.title: Anthropic Revenue Hits $47B Annualized Pre-IPO
cards.body: Anthropic's annualized revenue skyrocketed to $47 billion in May, up from $9 billion at end of 2025. CEO Daniela Amodei dismisses concerns about AI's ROI ahead of IPO.

cards.title: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky Launches AI Lab
cards.body: Chesky announced plans for a new AI lab after previously waiting for better LLM solutions. Airbnb will now develop custom AI capabilities in-house.

cards.title: StrictlyVC LA Explores Defense Tech and AI
cards.body: Leading investors, founders, and tech leaders gather June 18 at The Aerospace Corporation Campus. Event focuses on venture capital, defense tech, and AI developments.

cards.title: Meta Slashes Data Center Costs with Tent Strategy
cards.body: Meta discovered a cost-cutting approach: building data centers in tents. The unconventional method aims to dramatically reduce infrastructure spending.

cards.title: Poke First AI Agent Approved for Apple Messages
cards.body: Poke startup achieved milestone as first AI agent approved for Apple's Messages for Business. The text-based AI solution enables seamless agent interactions.

cards.title: Meta Launches AI Creator Assistant on Facebook
cards.body: Facebook creators can now use AI assistant to answer performance questions like "When should I post?" The tool simplifies analytics and audience insights.

cards.title: Hello Robot Releases Stretch Gen 4 Home Robot
cards.body: California startup Hello Robot launched the fourth-generation Stretch home assistant robot. The device represents progress toward mainstream home robotics adoption.

cards.title: Apple App Store Generates $1.4 Trillion Revenue
cards.body: Apple's App Store billings reached $1.4 trillion, up from $1.3 trillion prior year. Digital goods sales hit $149 billion with 90% commission-free transactions.

cards.title: Lovable Expands Google Cloud Deal 5x Dramatically
cards.body: Lovable signed multiyear expansion with Google Cloud involving 5x usage growth. Deal includes expanded access to Anthropic's Claude model capabilities.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches Lockdown Mode for Data Protection
cards.body: OpenAI unveiled Lockdown Mode to reduce prompt injection attacks that expose sensitive data in ChatGPT. While the feature won't eliminate vulnerability entirely, it aims to significantly lower the risk of data leakage.

cards.title: Google Commits $920M Monthly to SpaceX for Compute
cards.body: Google signed a major deal with SpaceX to secure computing resources at $920M per month. The company attributed the massive commitment to unexpected demand for its recently launched AI products.

cards.title: Industry Grapples with AI's Skyrocketing Operational Costs
cards.body: The AI sector is shifting focus from rapid growth to cost control as token expenses spiral. Industry leaders are now prioritizing guardrails and efficiency over the previous 'move fast' mentality.

cards.title: AirTrunk Invests $30B in Indian AI Data Centers
cards.body: Australian data center operator AirTrunk announced a massive $30 billion commitment to build 5GW of AI compute capacity in India. The expansion reflects soaring global demand for AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Anthropic's Revenue Skyrockets to $47B Annualized
cards.body: Anthropic announced annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up from roughly $9 billion at year-end 2025. Ahead of its IPO, the AI company faces questions about sustaining such explosive growth.

cards.title: Poke Becomes First AI Agent on Apple Messages
cards.body: Poke, a startup enabling AI agents via text messaging, gained approval as the first AI agent on Apple's Messages for Business platform. The move signals Apple's commitment to integrating AI tools into business communication.

cards.title: Meta Launches AI Assistant for Facebook Creators
cards.body: Meta rolled out a new AI creator assistant on Facebook that answers questions about posting times and audience engagement. Creators can now get instant insights without parsing complex dashboards.

cards.title: Lovable Expands Partnership with Google Cloud
cards.body: Lovable and Google signed a multiyear deal expanding Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud by 5x with enhanced access to Anthropic Claude. The partnership strengthens cloud-native AI development capabilities.

cards.title: Meta's AI Support Agent Compromised in Security Breach
cards.body: Attackers exploited Meta's AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts by requesting email link transfers. The breach highlights critical vulnerabilities in AI agent security beyond current mitigation frameworks.

cards.title: AI Chatbots Impact Human Brain and Focus
cards.body: Psychologists studying digital technology interaction report that AI chatbots may be affecting human cognitive control and attention. Researchers at UC Irvine are examining how constant AI assistance reshapes brain function.

cards.title: Courts Overwhelmed by AI-Generated Lawsuits
cards.body: Federal judges report a flood of AI-generated legal documents from unrepresented litigants, straining court resources. The low cost of AI-generated filings is creating new administrative challenges for the judiciary.

cards.title: Google Partners with Voltus on Virtual Power Plants
cards.body: Google signed a deal with Voltus to support virtual power plant infrastructure powering data centers on the largest U.S. power grid. The partnership aims to balance AI compute demands with grid stability.

cards.title: Small Businesses Leverage AI for Administrative Tasks
cards.body: AI systems are now capable of handling accounting, design, market research, and product development for small businesses. The technology addresses critical skill gaps without requiring full-time hires.

cards.title: Agentic AI Transforms Global Healthcare Delivery
cards.body: Agentic AI systems are being deployed to address chronic healthcare workforce shortages and fragmented care access. The technology promises to improve patient outcomes in under-resourced medical systems worldwide.

cards.title: LLMs Prove Most Resistant to Russian Propaganda
cards.body: Comparative testing shows certain large language models outperform others at resisting Russian propaganda narratives. The findings highlight AI safety importance in geopolitical information warfare.
